ai.description: Provider-neutral AI readiness for future article, analysis, support, and operations plugins.
ai.title: AI

empty.plugins: No AI task plugins are registered yet.

plugins.description: Concrete AI features register here as task plugins after their workflow is defined.
plugins.title: AI Task Plugins

policy.description: The same policy is stored in .ai so future modules can be checked against explicit backend-control-panel rules.

providers.description: Providers are configured by deployment-owned endpoint, protocol, model, and secret references.

runs.description: Future AI plugins will write queued, failed, and review-required work here.

attention.description: These queues should be checked before routine catalog or marketing work.
attention.emptyAfterSales: No open after-sales requests in the latest results.
attention.emptyAudit: No high-risk audit events in the latest results.
attention.emptyCatalog: No catalog items need stock or fulfillment review.
attention.emptyDelivery: No pending deliveries in the latest results.
attention.emptyPayment: No payment attempts need review in the latest results.
attention.title: Needs Attention

productPublishing.description: Prepare products for sale by checking their template, fulfillment handler, inventory backing, and next operational action.
productPublishing.emptyVariants: No product variants found. Create a product first, then return here to verify publishing readiness.

actions.description: High-risk actions are listed for operator planning and require separate confirmation plus evidence.

findings.description: Machine-readable findings generated from runtime settings; secret values are never shown.
findings.title: Findings

ops.title: Operations

adminExtensions.deliveryPolicyBody: This admin surface now sits on top of the delivery handler registry, so new delivery implementations can mount here without rewriting the delivery page flow.
adminExtensions.marketingBody: Checkout now resolves coupon and referral strategies before inventory reservation, records touchpoints, and finalizes rewards through strategy callbacks.
adminExtensions.marketingTitle: Coupon / referral / attribution are attached at payment-attempt creation
adminExtensions.paymentsBody: Manual mark-paid and webhook-paid operations now emit domain events and write audit logs through the support-audit subscriber.

afterSales.description: Review customer requests and record handling results.
afterSales.title: After-sales

analytics.description: Canonical analytics events captured from platform hooks and storefront actions.
analytics.dispatchDescription: Per-destination delivery records with retry state and failure diagnostics.

audit.description: Inspect sensitive operations and high-risk access events.
audit.title: Audit Logs

credentials.accountPasswordError: Line {{line}} must include both account and password
credentials.description: Import encrypted digital credentials and inspect safe inventory state.
credentials.jsonArrayRequired: Credentials must be a JSON array
credentials.label: Label
credentials.loadFailed: Failed to load credential inventory data.
credentials.manualVariantIdHelp: The current value is a manually entered variant ID. The backend will still validate that it exists and supports credential inventory.
credentials.selectProductVariantHelp: Select the product variant that should receive these credentials.
credentials.templateHelp: Paste one credential per line. Supported formats: card key, account----password, account,password, account|password, account:password, JSON object lines, or a JSON array.
credentials.title: Credential Inventory
credentials.unsupportedVariant: This product variant does not support credential inventory imports.
credentials.variantRequired: Select or enter a product variant ID.

deliveries.deliveryPayload: Delivery payload for manual/file/API fulfillment. JSON objects are accepted; plain text is stored as-is.
deliveries.existingToken: Existing delivery returned; token is not reissued.

deliveries.title: Deliveries
